description_long: This is a large, two-story residential house with a complex roof structure featuring both gable and hip elements. The front facade is characterized by a covered porch with arches, white exterior walls, and multiple windows arranged in symmetrical rows. The property is surrounded by manicured lawns, flowering trees, and a tall hedge providing privacy along the perimeter. The backyard includes a paved patio area with outdoor seating, umbrellas, and a swimming pool, as well as a driveway leading to a garage. The landscaping is lush and well-maintained, with decorative shrubs and flower beds accentuating the house's elegant appearance.
description: A spacious two-story house with a white exterior, arched porch, symmetrical windows, and landscaped gardens, featuring a backyard pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched porch, main entryway, symmetrical windows, and manicured front lawn with flowering trees.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the driveway, garage, backyard patio, pool area, and privacy hedge.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the long row of windows, lush hedge, pool area, and outdoor seating with umbrellas.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the garage, driveway, and additional landscaping, with the roof structure clearly visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, arched openings, steps, and decorative columns.
